where.if: AND ( a.plan_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.plan_name_smt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.plan_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.id IN ( SELECT distinct a.plan_list_id FROM tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_plan_benefits c WHERE a.plan_list_id = b.id AND a.plan_benefits_id = c.id AND c.display_yn = 'Y' AND NOW() >= c.display_period_start AND NOW() <= c.display_period_end AND ( c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ) )
AND a.id in (select plan_id from tb_svc_banner_plan_list where banner_id = #{searchBannerId})
AND a.id in (select plan_id from tb_evt_plan_list where event_id = #{searchEventId})

AND (
a.plan_tag1 IN (SELECT b.code FROM tb_pmb_plan_tag_category a, tb_cmm_code b WHERE cate_id =#{searchPlanTag} AND a.tag_id = b.code AND b.code_group = 'plan_tag_code' and b.use_yn = 'Y') OR a.plan_tag2 IN (SELECT b.code FROM tb_pmb_plan_tag_category a, tb_cmm_code b WHERE cate_id =#{searchPlanTag} AND a.tag_id = b.code AND b.code_group = 'plan_tag_code' and b.use_yn = 'Y') OR a.plan_tag3 IN (SELECT b.code FROM tb_pmb_plan_tag_category a, tb_cmm_code b WHERE cate_id =#{searchPlanTag} AND a.tag_id = b.code AND b.code_group = 'plan_tag_code' and b.use_yn = 'Y') OR a.plan_tag4 IN (SELECT b.code FROM tb_pmb_plan_tag_category a, tb_cmm_code b WHERE cate_id =#{searchPlanTag} AND a.tag_id = b.code AND b.code_group = 'plan_tag_code' and b.use_yn = 'Y') OR a.plan_tag5 IN (SELECT b.code FROM tb_pmb_plan_tag_category a, tb_cmm_code b WHERE cate_id =#{searchPlanTag} AND a.tag_id = b.code AND b.code_group = 'plan_tag_code' and b.use_yn = 'Y') )

mapper.sql:
a.id ,a.uuid ,a.plan_code ,a.plan_name ,a.plan_name_smt ,a.mno ,a.host ,b.name hostNm ,b.company_mng_code as companyMngCode ,a.plan_type ,a.sup_data_val ,a.sup_qos ,a.sup_call_val ,a.sup_sms_val ,a.normal_price ,a.sale_price ,a.after_price ,a.promotion_period ,a.promotion_period_val ,a.combination_enable ,a.benefit ,a.freebies ,a.link_url ,a.url_smt ,a.business_name ,a.etc ,a.sale_status ,a.disp_yn ,a.new_yn ,a.image_badge_special ,a.image_badge_it_comb ,a.image_badge_add_data ,a.image_badge_add_data_nm ,a.image_badge_simple_open ,a.image_badge_lowest ,a.supp_content ,a.no_supp_content ,a.notice_content ,a.event_banner_image_pc ,a.event_banner_image_mo ,a.event_banner_image_url ,a.event_banner_image_target ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,b.allyPartnetYn ,a.recom_order1 ,a.recom_order2 ,a.recom_order3 ,a.point_plan_yn ,a.m12_price ,a.m24_price ,IFNULL(a.sup_call_buga_val, '') as sup_call_buga_val ,(a.sup_qos / 1024) AS int_qos ,a.daily_data ,a.plan_name_smt_sub ,a.second_price ,a.new_num_req_url ,a.num_move_req_url ,a.sup_data_total ,a.pc_url ,a.mo_url ,plan_tag1 ,plan_tag2 ,plan_tag3 ,plan_tag4 ,plan_tag5 ,(select max(logo_img) from tb_mbm_company_list where id = a.host) planLogoImg ,(select count(1) from tb_pmb_plan_zzim where prod_id = a.id AND a.disp_yn ='Y') planZzimCnt ,(select count(1) from tb_pmb_plan_req_mng where req_prod = a.id AND a.disp_yn ='Y') planReqCnt ,IFNULL((select max(score) from tb_csm_semotong_review where plan_id = a.id), 0) reviewAvg ,IFNULL((SELECT AVG(score) FROM tb_csm_semotong_review WHERE company_id = a.host AND plan_id = -1), 0) mvnoReviewAvg
,(select count(1) from tb_pmb_plan_zzim where prod_id = a.id AND a.disp_yn ='Y' and user_mng_id =#{searchUserId} ) planLoginUserZzimCnt
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.uuid, a.plan_code, a.plan_name, a.plan_name_smt, a.mno, a.host, b.name AS hostNm, b.company_mng_code AS companyMngCode, a.plan_type, a.sup_data_val, a.sup_qos, a.sup_call_val, a.sup_sms_val, a.normal_price, a.sale_price, a.after_price, a.promotion_period, a.promotion_period_val, a.combination_enable, a.benefit, a.freebies, a.link_url, a.url_smt, a.business_name, a.etc, a.sale_status, a.disp_yn, a.new_yn, a.image_badge_special, a.image_badge_it_comb, a.image_badge_add_data, a.image_badge_add_data_nm, a.image_badge_simple_open, a.image_badge_lowest, a.supp_content, a.no_supp_content, a.notice_content, a.event_banner_image_pc, a.event_banner_image_mo, a.event_banner_image_url, a.event_banner_image_target, a.create_date, a.create_id, a.modified_date, a.modified_id, b.allyPartnetYn, a.recom_order1, a.recom_order2, a.recom_order3, a.point_plan_yn, a.m12_price, a.m24_price, IFNULL(a.sup_call_buga_val, '') AS sup_call_buga_val, (a.sup_qos / 1024) AS int_qos, a.daily_data, a.plan_name_smt_sub, a.second_price, a.new_num_req_url, a.num_move_req_url, a.sup_data_total, a.pc_url, a.mo_url, a.plan_tag1, a.plan_tag2, a.plan_tag3, a.plan_tag4, a.plan_tag5, b.logo_img AS planLogoImg, IFNULL(zz.planZzimCnt, 0) AS planZzimCnt, IFNULL(req.planReqCnt, 0) AS planReqCnt, IFNULL(r.reviewAvg, 0) AS reviewAvg, IFNULL(rv.mvnoReviewAvg, 0) AS mvnoReviewAvg FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT prod_id, COUNT(1) AS planZzimCnt FROM tb_pmb_plan_zzim GROUP BY prod_id ) zz ON zz.prod_id = a.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT req_prod, COUNT(1) AS planReqCnt FROM tb_pmb_plan_req_mng GROUP BY req_prod ) req ON req.req_prod = a.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT plan_id, MAX(score) AS reviewAvg FROM tb_csm_semotong_review GROUP BY plan_id ) r ON r.plan_id = a.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id, AVG(score) AS mvnoReviewAvg FROM tb_csm_semotong_review WHERE plan_id = -1 GROUP BY company_id ) rv ON rv.company_id = a.host
LEFT JOIN tb_pmb_plan_sales_plan_list f ON a.id = f.plan_id WHERE f.sales_id = #{searchSalesId} ORDER BY f.order_no
ORDER BY normal_price
ORDER BY planZzimCnt DESC
ORDER BY after_price
ORDER BY m12_price
ORDER BY m24_price
ORDER BY sale_price
ORDER BY allyPartnetYn desc, sale_price
ORDER BY sup_data_total DESC
ORDER BY allyPartnetYn desc, sup_qos desc, normal_price
ORDER BY allyPartnetYn desc, sup_qos desc, planZzimCnt DESC
ORDER BY allyPartnetYn desc, sup_qos desc, m12_price
ORDER BY allyPartnetYn desc, sup_qos desc, m24_price
ORDER BY allyPartnetYn desc, sup_qos desc, sale_price
ORDER BY allyPartnetYn desc, sup_qos desc, sup_data_total DESC
ORDER BY recom_order2 DESC, allyPartnetYn desc, sup_qos desc, sale_price
ORDER BY recom_order3 DESC, allyPartnetYn desc, sup_qos desc, sale_price
ORDER BY recom_order1 DESC, allyPartnetYn desc, sale_price
ORDER BY recom_order1 DESC, FIELD(companyMngCode, 'KT', 'LGU', 'SKT'), sale_price
ORDER BY new_yn DESC,saleStatus desc
LIMIT #{offset}, #{recordSize}

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id WHERE a.id=#{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_svc_banner_plan_list a LEFT JOIN tb_pmb_plan_list b ON a.plan_id = b.id WHERE a.banner_id = #{searchBannerId}

SELECT
,c.plan_memo as chatbotPlanMeno ,c.recom_yn as chatbotPlanRecomYn ,c.low_price_yn as chatbotPlanLowPriceYn ,c.max_benefit_yn as chatbotPlanMaxBenefitYn ,c.order_seq AS chatbotPlanOrderNo FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a left outer join tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id left outer join tb_svc_chatbot_group_plan c ON a.id = c.plan WHERE 1=1 AND c.chatbot_group_id = #{searchChatbotGroupId} ORDER BY c.order_seq

SELECT count(1) FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a left outer join tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id left outer join tb_pmb_recomplan_planlist c ON a.id = c.plan_id WHERE 1=1 AND c.mng_id = #{recomMngId} ORDER BY c.order_no

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a left outer join tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id left outer join tb_pmb_recomplan_planlist c ON a.id = c.plan_id WHERE 1=1 AND c.mng_id = #{recomMngId} ORDER BY c.order_no

SELECT a.id, a.UUID, a.plan_code, a.plan_name, a.plan_name_smt, a.plan_name_smt_sub, a.mno, a.join_count, b.company_mng_code, b.name hostNm FROM tb_pmb_plan_list a LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.host = b.id WHERE sale_status = 1 AND disp_yn = 1 AND join_count > 0 ORDER BY ifnull(recom_order4,999) ASC , join_count DESC limit 5
